message:
feat(demo): add mode-specific sidebar rendering and hit area registration

Extends the code explorer with mode-aware sidebar rendering and
comprehensive mouse hit area registration for all sidebar panels.

Mode-specific rendering:
- Rename render_sidebar() to render_sidebar_source() for clarity
- Add render() dispatch based on current ExplorerMode
- Prepare stubs for QueryLab and ExecutionPlan sidebar variants
- Each mode can have distinct sidebar content and layout

Sidebar layout management:
- Add reset_sidebar_layouts() helper to clear layout caches
- Called at start of sidebar render to ensure fresh state
- Prevents stale layout rects from persisting across mode switches

Hit area registration:
- Register each sidebar panel (info, context, hotspots, radar, spotlight)
- Enables click-to-focus for individual panels
- Applied consistently across all layout configurations:
  - 5-panel layout (height >= 28)
  - 4-panel layout (medium height)
  - 3-panel compact layout (small height)

These changes make the code explorer a better reference implementation
for building complex multi-panel widgets with mouse interaction.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
